Identity.Tooltip: Roman Legionaries were the backbone of the Roman Army during the late Republic and into the Empire phase. They gain +0.5 Hack and Pierce resistance and are 25% faster builders. They take 10% addiontal train time and cost +10 metal. Fuit, meat and wood gather rates are 25% slower, than other elite soliders. Metal and stone is 50% slower. And they can not farm.
